content_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the short trailer under its baseline; licensed music is excluded from transcript-only processing.

transcript_rights.rationale: NASA publishes the short-trailer VTT as an official same-group caption asset; retain privately with provenance and do not mix the extended variant.

content_completeness.rationale: The official source publishes the complete short-trailer transcript; the separate extended-trailer artifacts are excluded and the 1.237-second tail remains recorded.

retention_and_derivation.rationale: Caption-only private evaluation; soundtrack/media remain link-only.

third_party_caveats: Universal Production Music track is not retained, extracted, or redistributed.

version_equivalence.evidence: The first/short-trailer group co-locates the Short MP4, Short VTT/SRT/transcript, and exact official YouTube link; the extended group is excluded.
